title: Journey to the North-East
description: A combat focused datapack that revolves around powerful new weaponry and deadly bosses.
body:
### **PLEASE USE THE WIKI THE PACK FEATURES A CUSTOM CRAFTING SYSTEM AND IS NIGH UNPLAYABLE WITHOUT THE WIKI**


Journey to the North East is a combat focused adventure datapack that adds a variety of new content to spice up your Minecraft experience.

Featuring:
A large arsenal of weaponary : Shoot webs like a spider with the Webshooter, blow your enemies up with powerful magic via the Arcane Tome, and apply a deadly poison with the Withersbane.

Powerful new gear : Soar through the skies, fade into the shadows, or dodge your enemies' attacks with ease.

4 deadly bosses : Gear up to take down the three new bosses featured in this pack, including the return of a former foe.

Challenge worlds (in versions prior to 2.4) : Accessible by holding down alt on world type and clicking to cycle through them, challenge worlds are inspired by terraira secret seeds and feature unique terrain and world generation. - Now removed from update 2.4 onwards

Even more : Minibosses, a new crafting system and more!



Known issues: 
> - 3d skin layers breaks the mannequins and removes their second skin layer.
> - Scoreboard values won't load for players who joined after the intial load but before 2.1, to fix run /advancement revoke @a only combatplus:actual_advancement_tree/root whilst they are online
> - Any mod that boosts flight speed boosts speed such a Lunar Client toggle sprint/sneak mod will boost Shadow Sneakers speed.
> - Toggle Sprint/Sneak (the vanilla version, not modded, although I've only tested Lunar Client) will constantly activate abilities such as Dodge Boots or Ruby Lunge.
> - Bedbugs just break if thrown at the wrong angle.

Inspired by many adventure / exploration mods such as Terramity and Orespawn.
